item.title: Web Development
item.description: Transform complex business requirements into fast, secure, and scalable web applications. Whether you are launching a modern SaaS platform, deploying an enterprise portal, or optimizing an existing web app for peak performance, every solution is built with clean architecture, enterprise-grade reliability, and a relentless focus on user experience. What I Deliver Custom SaaS & Platform Engineering Build robust, multi-tenant Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) applications designed to scale. From architecture to deployment, solutions feature:

item.title: Consulting
item.description: At its core, consulting is simply renting out specialized expertise to solve a specific problem. When a company hits a wall, wants to grow faster, or needs to implement a massive change, they bring in consultants. Think of them as corporate doctors: they diagnose the issue, prescribe a solution, and sometimes stick around to help administer the treatment. Why Companies Hire Consultants Organizations usually write big checks to consulting firms for four main reasons:

item.title: Apex Real Estate
item.description: End-to-end property management system built with Laravel and Angular.

item.title: TalentFlow ATS
item.description: Automated recruitment pipeline with custom assessment modules.

item.title: Sterock Engineering
item.description: Multilingual corporate site with interactive project map integrations.

item.title: How to Build a Fast Developer Portfolio with Hugo and Tailwind CSS
item.description: A practical guide to building a modern portfolio website with Hugo, Tailwind CSS, reusable partials, and content-driven architecture.

item.title: How to Build a Fast Developer Portfolio with Hugo and Tailwind CSS
item.description: A practical guide to building a modern portfolio website with Hugo, Tailwind CSS, reusable partials, and content-driven architecture.

item.title: Implement Username or Email Authentication in Laravel
item.description: A step-by-step guide to implementing username or email authentication in Laravel.

item.title: The Power of JavaScript's reduce() Function
item.description: Master JavaScript’s reduce() function through practical examples and common real-world use cases.

item.title: How to Create a Simple Floating Menu with HTML and CSS
item.description: Build a responsive floating navigation menu using HTML and CSS with a clean, step-by-step guide.

item.title: Upload Files to GitHub Using a Bash Script
item.description: Learn how to automate Git commits and pushes with a reusable Bash deployment script.

item.title: How to Install Composer Globally in XAMPP (LAMPP) on Ubuntu
item.description: A step-by-step guide to installing Composer globally in XAMPP (LAMPP) on Ubuntu.

item.title: How to Build a WordPress Website and Host It for Free
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to creating a WordPress website and publishing it online without paying for hosting.

item.title: Hire Me
item.description: Let’s Work Together I’m currently available for freelance and full-time opportunities. If you have a project in mind, feel free to reach out via email or form. Email: hello@tejirimayone.com.ng Response time: 24–48 hours
